'''tadhoyo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zemindarship|zemindarship]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-dh-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zemindarship|zemindarship]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| tadhoyo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:tædheyeth|tædheyeth]] || [[word:tædheyej|tædheyej]] || [[word:tædheyesh|tædheyesh]] || [[word:tædheye|tædheye]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:tadhodhoyoth|tadhodhoyoth]] || [[word:tadhodhoyoj|tadhodhoyoj]] || [[word:tadhodhoyosh|tadhodhoyosh]] || [[word:tadhodhoyo|tadhodhoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tadhoyoth|tadhoyoth]] || [[word:tadhoyoj|tadhoyoj]] || [[word:tadhoyosh|tadhoyosh]] || [[word:tadhoyo|tadhoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tadhofyoth|tadhofyoth]] || [[word:tadhofyoj|tadhofyoj]] || [[word:tadhofyosh|tadhofyosh]] || [[word:tadhofyof|tadhofyof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tadhoyotho|tadhoyotho]] || [[word:tadhoyojo|tadhoyojo]] || [[word:tadhoyosho|tadhoyosho]] || [[word:tadhoyoko|tadhoyoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tadhoyoth|tadhoyoth]] || [[word:tadhoyoj|tadhoyoj]] || [[word:tadhoyosh|tadhoyosh]] || [[word:tadhoyo|tadhoyo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tadhoyothol|tadhoyothol]] || [[word:tadhoyojol|tadhoyojol]] || [[word:tadhoyoshol|tadhoyoshol]] || [[word:tadhoyokol|tadhoyokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tadhoyothotho|tadhoyothotho]] || [[word:tadhoyojojo|tadhoyojojo]] || [[word:tadhoyoshosho|tadhoyoshosho]] || [[word:tadhoyoko|tadhoyoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tadhoyothon|tadhoyothon]] || [[word:tadhoyojon|tadhoyojon]] || [[word:tadhoyoshon|tadhoyoshon]] || [[word:tadhoyokon|tadhoyokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tadhoyothoro|tadhoyothoro]] || [[word:tadhoyojoro|tadhoyojoro]] || [[word:tadhoyoshoro|tadhoyoshoro]] || [[word:tadhoyokoro|tadhoyokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|16f482d}}
